faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Maspeth?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Maspeth typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points, and necessary repairs. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Maspeth property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency raccoon removal services throughout Maspeth. Most raccoon trapping and removal can begin within 24 hours of your call. Complete exclusion and prevention work may take 2-5 days depending on the extent of damage and entry points.

faqs.question: Are raccoons dangerous to Maspeth residents?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons can pose health and safety risks. They may carry rabies, roundworm, and other diseases, and can become aggressive when cornered or protecting young. Raccoons also cause property damage by tearing through roofing, insulation, and wiring. Professional removal is always recommended.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees for raccoon removal in Maspeth?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide written warranties on all our raccoon exclusion work in Maspeth. If raccoons return to sealed entry points within the warranty period, we'll return at no additional charge. Our comprehensive approach includes removal, cleanup, repairs, and prevention to ensure long-term results.
